text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin Juvenile Fillies is a very prestigious
race, and Trainer looks incredibly nervous right
now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if we had met after I was a bit more grown
up, Trainer wouldn't always be so worried for
me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wonder why we had to meet now, of all times...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No. This isn't the time. I have to focus on the
race. Trainer believes in me and said I'll be fine.
So I just have to run for Trainer's sake!
